## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI-driven content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance shows positive trends with increased clicks (250+) and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [API directory pages are top performers, driving traffic but need optimization for conversions](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to balance informational, transactional, and API pages with focus on use cases and problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [New AI-generated image workflow introduced for potential implementation in content](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Significant boost in clicks (250+) and impressions after fixing crawling/indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Overall site performance trending upward](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Monitoring impact of Google's AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) updates](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Current strategies align well with industry best practices for AI/AEO](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [API directory pages: 12 of top 25 articles by clicks, lowest conversion intent](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Embedding relevant YouTube videos in API directory pages to improve conversion](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Shifting focus to use cases, problem-solving, and code examples in API content](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [Balancing content mix: informational, transactional, and API pages](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Considering refreshes for some informational content](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2796.0)

### AI-Generated Images Workflow

  - [New workflow introduced for creating branded, templated images](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)
  - [Potential for generating data visualizations (e.g., pie charts) from content](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2540.0)
  - [Focus on diagrams and relevant visualizations rather than random images](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)

### Content Optimization

  - [Titles: Aim for YouTube-style headlines (50-60 characters) vs. Google-style](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)
  - [Allow for some clickbait elements to improve engagement](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
  - [Top-performing title types: "How to do X", "How X does Y", and "Best practices"](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2633.0)
  - [Increase information density, focusing on solving specific problems](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=3350.0)
  - [Consider adding FAQs at the bottom for introductory information](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=3360.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [On track for 17 new backlinks by month-end](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Gradual increase in backlinks to avoid raising red flags with Google](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

### AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) Insights

  - [Best practices articles performing well in AI-driven searches](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Focus on authoritative, definitive content for AEO success](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carrie to update content mix, including refreshes and less common topic areas](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2996.0)
  - [Adrian to provide feedback on transactional content by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2908.0)
  - [Dave and Adrian to follow up on programmatic SEO responsibilities and must-haves](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Team to implement new content strategy focusing on use cases and problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2349.0)
  - [Evaluate and potentially implement new AI-generated image workflow](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance and AEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/uxKsLmPAhLSR1FGzUihnk76jUYos4ktu?tab=summary&timestamp=3302.0)
